name: XCH Annuity
tagline: Transferable, tradable streamed annuities on Chia — vesting by the second.
description:
An Xchannuity is an **on-chain annuity coin** that releases a fixed principal to its owner linearly over a time window. The owner can claim whatever has vested at any moment, transfer the unvested remainder to someone else, or sell it via a standard Chia offer.

The annuity is presented in **XCH** — under the hood the coin is a 1:1 wrapped-XCH CAT (cMOJO), wrapped on deposit and melted back to native XCH on withdrawal, so users only ever see and hold XCH.

## How it works

The annuity coin is a `CAT<StreamLayer>`: a Chia CAT whose inner puzzle enforces the vesting math and ownership.

- **Claim** *(owner-authorized)* — pay out everything vested up to now; the unvested remainder continues as a fresh annuity coin.
- **Transfer** *(owner-authorized, plain or via offer)* — hand the remainder to a new owner. Value can never become liquid early; the vesting window is preserved across every continuation.
- **Clawback** *(issuer, optional)* — an annuity created with a clawback address can be reclaimed by its issuer; one created without is permanent.

Create, claim, and trade from the app with a Sage wallet over WalletConnect — one atomic signature to wrap, mint, and fund.
